<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This project is a Vue 3 application for testing screens (mobile and web). Features include:
- Platform selection (Mobile/Web)
- Mobile: touch sensitivity, RGB color tests, dead pixel test
- Web: color tests, dead pixel test
- Each test has a dedicated view/component
